name: nn-observability
description: Architecture and training recipe determine whether activation monitoring can catch confident transformer errors. In some configurations training preserves a decision-quality signal that output confidence does not expose; in others it erases the signal while perplexity continues to improve. Code and data for 33 evaluated transformer checkpoints across 7 families (26 primary plus 7 instruct variants), establishing signal engineering as a training-time design axis alongside loss and capability.
rai:dataCollection: This repository is a consumer of seven public Hugging Face datasets, not a creator. No data collection occurred here. Each dataset is loaded at a pinned revision (results/dataset_revisions.json) and used as the source for tokenized text inputs and downstream-task items. Upstream collection methods are documented on each dataset's Hugging Face card and source publication; see DATA.md for per-dataset role and reference links.
rai:dataPreprocessingProtocol: Per-dataset preprocessing is documented in DATA.md (subset and transforms per dataset). Probe targets are partial-correlation residuals after controlling for max-softmax confidence and activation norm, computed by analysis code shipped in src/probe.py and src/observe.py and locked at 1e-12 tolerance by tests/test_producer_invariants.py.
rai:annotationsPerItem: No annotations are produced by this repository. Persisted artifacts are derived statistics (per-token loss values, observer scores, partial correlations, exclusive-catch counts), not labels assigned to source-text items.
rai:dataAnnotationProtocol: Not applicable. No annotations are produced by this repository. Upstream datasets carry their own annotation protocols, documented in their respective Hugging Face cards and source publications (see DATA.md per-dataset entries for citations).
rai:personalSensitiveInformation: Per-dataset PII posture mirrors DATA.md (PII and sensitive content section). WikiText-103, SQuAD v2, MedQA-USMLE, and TruthfulQA are low-risk: encyclopedic or synthetic content with no human subjects beyond the upstream Wikipedia or exam-board sources. C4 and OpenWebText carry web-scrape residuals from public internet text. CodeSearchNet (Python) carries author-identifier residuals from open-source GitHub comments and string literals. This repository does not collect, redistribute, or expose source-text content; persisted artifacts are derived statistics that are not text-recoverable.
rai:dataUseCases: Recommended: reproducing the observability protocol on the same models, extending it to additional autoregressive transformers under the same probe class, using the WikiText-trained observer as a starting point for methodological hardening, and probing-validity research that builds on the confidence-controlled and output-controlled framework. Out-of-scope: production or regulated deployment in clinical, legal, financial, hiring, lending, or content-moderation contexts; generalization to multilingual or non-text settings without re-validation; detection of fluent confident falsehoods (the paper reports near-chance TruthfulQA AUC across three production instruct models); adversarial-robustness claims under adaptive attacks. See DATA.md and MODELS.md for the full statements.
rai:dataLimitations: All seven datasets are English-language. The paper's findings are scoped to English text and the populations represented (Wikipedia editors, web users, crowdworkers, US medical board examiners, open-source Python developers, adversarial fact-pattern selection). Cross-language and cross-demographic generalization is not measured. Activation-monitor robustness under adaptive attacks is not measured (McGuinness et al., 2025). Upstream creators do not release training-data composition for several model families (Llama, Gemma, Mistral, Qwen, Phi); cross-recipe and cross-family contrasts are observational, not causal.
rai:dataReleaseMaintenancePlan: Versioned releases tagged on GitHub and snapshotted on Zenodo (concept DOI in this descriptor's `sameAs`). Every release pins per-model and per-dataset Hugging Face SHAs verified against the live HF API by scripts/verify_manifest_revisions.py; the latest verification report is exposed through the manifest-verification FileObject. Schema validation runs on every push; result-JSON drift is blocked by CI. The Croissant descriptor is regenerated on every release.
usageInfo: Repository source code, result schemas, and human-readable documentation are MIT-licensed (this descriptor's `license` field). Result JSON values are statistical summaries derived from frozen activations of upstream public models; model weights are never redistributed, and downstream use of result JSON values must respect the upstream terms recorded in NOTICE. Per-model and per-dataset license attribution is recorded in results/model_revisions.json and results/dataset_revisions.json (also exposed through the model-revisions and dataset-revisions FileObjects, and as queryable records in the hugging-face-models and hugging-face-datasets RecordSets). Built with Llama: this repository evaluates Llama 3.2 1B, 3B, 1B-Instruct, and Llama 3.1 8B; downstream redistributors of derived artifacts include the "Built with Llama" attribution required by the Llama Community License and remain bound by Meta's Acceptable Use Policy. Gemma 3 derivatives are governed by the Gemma Terms of Use, including the Prohibited Use Policy. Qwen 2.5 3B base and 3B Instruct are released under the Qwen Research License (custom, non-commercial); derivatives that depend on these two checkpoints inherit the non-commercial restriction. The other 25 evaluated checkpoints ship under permissive licenses (MIT or Apache 2.0). See MODELS.md, DATA.md, and the top-level NOTICE file for the per-family compatibility tables and required attribution.
citeAs: Carmichael, T. (2026). Architecture Determines Observability of Transformers. Zenodo. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19435674

distribution.name: nn-observability-archive
distribution.description: Source repository at v5.1.0. The sha256 is a merkle hash over (filename, sha256) pairs of every distribution file under results/, computed by scripts/generate_croissant.py; rerun the generator on a clean clone to verify.

distribution.name: model-revisions
distribution.description: Hugging Face model IDs, pinned commit hashes, and per-model license attribution for every evaluated model. Llama 3.2 / 3.1 entries carry the Llama Community License; Gemma 3 entries carry the Gemma license; the remaining five families ship under MIT or Apache 2.0. See MODELS.md for the license-compatibility table and downstream-derivative constraints.

distribution.name: dataset-revisions
distribution.description: Hugging Face dataset IDs, pinned commit hashes, and per-dataset license attribution for every paper-cited evaluation corpus. Per-entry licenses span MIT, Apache 2.0, CC0, CC BY 4.0, CC BY-SA 4.0, and ODC-BY 1.0. See DATA.md for the license-compatibility table and downstream-derivative constraints.

distribution.name: manifest-verification
distribution.description: Programmatic verification of every model_revisions entry against the live Hugging Face API.

distribution.name: dynamics-results
distribution.description: Pythia checkpoint trajectory: pcorr and oc_residual across training steps.

distribution.name: legacy-results
distribution.description: Pre-v3.0.0 phase-taxonomy outputs preserved as provenance.

distribution.name: main-results
distribution.description: Per-model output of the canonical 350 ex/dim 7-seed observability protocol.

distribution.name: medqa-results
distribution.description: MedQA-USMLE multiple-choice exclusive-catch rates by flag rate.

distribution.name: nonlinear-probe-results
distribution.description: Matched-HP and swept-HP MLP-vs-linear comparison per model.

distribution.name: residualizer-split-results
distribution.description: Split-fit OLS residualizer test (separate fit pool from probe pool).

distribution.name: squad-results
distribution.description: SQuAD 2.0 reading-comprehension exclusive-catch rates by flag rate.

distribution.name: truthfulqa-results
distribution.description: TruthfulQA generation exclusive-catch rates and AUC by flag rate.

distribution.name: width-sweep-results
distribution.description: Output-side MLP width sweep (64-512 units) on Qwen 7B.

recordSet.name: hugging-face-models
recordSet.description: All Hugging Face transformer checkpoints evaluated in the paper. Each record carries the model identifier, pinned commit SHA, family-level license, and the URL to the upstream license text. The cross-family cohort and Pythia controlled suite are defined as named scopes in analysis/load_results.py.

field.name: model_id
field.description: Hugging Face model identifier (org/name).

field.name: commit
field.description: Pinned Hugging Face commit SHA (40-char hex git revision).

field.name: url
field.description: Canonical Hugging Face URL for the model repository.

field.name: contentUrl
field.description: Hugging Face tree URL pinned to the recorded commit.

field.name: license
field.description: License identifier (SPDX where available, otherwise the upstream label).

field.name: license_url
field.description: URL to the upstream license text.

recordSet.name: hugging-face-datasets
recordSet.description: All Hugging Face datasets used as eval corpora or producer inputs in the paper. Each record carries the dataset identifier, config name, pinned commit SHA, license, and the URL to the upstream license text. Producer scripts pass the recorded commit via the revision= argument to load_dataset, enforced by tests/test_script_preflight.py.

field.name: dataset_id
field.description: Hugging Face dataset identifier (org/name).

field.name: config
field.description: Dataset config / subset name, or empty string if unconfigured.

field.name: commit
field.description: Pinned Hugging Face commit SHA (40-char hex git revision).

field.name: url
field.description: Canonical Hugging Face URL for the dataset repository.

field.name: contentUrl
field.description: Hugging Face tree URL pinned to the recorded commit.

field.name: license
field.description: License identifier (SPDX where available, otherwise the upstream label).

field.name: license_url
field.description: URL to the upstream license text.

recordSet.name: bootstrap-results-records
recordSet.description: Output of scripts/split_bootstrap_gpu.py. Resamples WikiText documents to bound probe-stability CI at the peak layer.

field.name: model
field.description: Hugging Face model identifier (org/name).

field.name: peak_layer
field.description: Peak layer index used for the bootstrap.

field.name: ex_dim
field.description: Tokens-per-feature-dim ratio for the probe fit (350 ex/dim canonical).

field.name: n_boot
field.description: Number of document-level bootstrap resamples.

field.name: boot_rhos
field.description: Per-resample partial Spearman values. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: mean
field.description: Bootstrap mean of partial Spearman.

field.name: std
field.description: Bootstrap standard deviation of partial Spearman.

field.name: ci_95
field.description: [low, high] 95% bootstrap CI. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: design
field.description: Resampling design metadata (probe_seed, note, etc.). (JSON-serialized)

field.name: provenance
field.description: Run-level reproducibility metadata: model SHA, generating script, timestamp, device.

recordSet.name: dynamics-results-records
recordSet.description: Per-checkpoint observability trajectory for a single model across training. One JSON per model (e.g., pythia-1b_dynamics.json).

field.name: model
field.description: Hugging Face model identifier (org/name) for the trajectory's final checkpoint.

field.name: experiment
field.description: Experiment label (e.g., pythia_1b_dynamics).

field.name: n_layers
field.description: Transformer depth (number of decoder blocks).

field.name: hidden_dim
field.description: Hidden dimension (model width).

field.name: heads
field.description: Number of attention heads per layer.

field.name: architecture_class
field.description: Configuration class label (e.g., '24L_16H').

field.name: expected_status
field.description: Pre-registered expectation for this configuration.

field.name: protocol
field.description: Probe protocol shared across checkpoints (seeds, target tokens-per-dim ratio, batch size). (JSON-serialized)

field.name: checkpoints
field.description: Per-checkpoint observability. Keys are 'step{N}' or numeric strings. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: provenance
field.description: Run-level reproducibility metadata. model_revision is the sentinel 'multi' for dynamics runs (per-checkpoint SHAs live on each checkpoint entry). (JSON-serialized)

recordSet.name: legacy-results-records
recordSet.description: Floor schema for historical phase-taxonomy artifacts (transformer_observe.json, *_sae-comparison.json, *_bottleneck-scaling.json, *_exdim-1000.json, *_exdim-sweep.json). These predate the v3+ scope. Required only: a well-formed provenance block. Top-level field shapes vary by phase artifact and are not constrained here.

field.name: provenance
field.description: Run-level reproducibility metadata: model SHA, generating script, timestamp, device.

recordSet.name: main-results-records
recordSet.description: Single-model output of scripts/run_model.py. One JSON per model under canonical 350 ex/dim 7-seed protocol.

field.name: model
field.description: Hugging Face model identifier (org/name).

field.name: n_params_b
field.description: Parameter count in billions.

field.name: n_layers
field.description: Transformer depth (number of decoder blocks).

field.name: hidden_dim
field.description: Hidden dimension (model width).

field.name: provenance
field.description: Run-level reproducibility metadata: model SHA, generating script, timestamp, device.

field.name: protocol
field.description: Probe protocol parameters: seeds, target tokens-per-feature-dim ratio, batch and layer-pass shapes. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: peak_layer_final
field.description: Peak layer index after multi-seed evaluation (canonical).

field.name: peak_layer
field.description: Peak layer index (legacy field name; equivalent to peak_layer_final).

field.name: peak_layer_frac
field.description: Peak layer index expressed as fraction of total depth.

field.name: layer_profile
field.description: Per-layer pcorr; keys are stringified layer indices. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: multi_layer_eval
field.description: Multi-seed evaluation at top candidate layers. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: partial_corr
field.description: Confidence-controlled partial Spearman at peak layer.

field.name: test_split_comparison
field.description: Held-out test-split partial Spearman across seeds (held-in/held-out generalization check). (JSON-serialized)

field.name: seed_agreement
field.description: Mean rank-correlation between probe predictions across seeds at the peak layer. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: output_controlled
field.description: Output-controlled residual (rho after also controlling for trained final-layer predictor). (JSON-serialized)

field.name: baselines
field.description: Hand-designed baseline pcorr values (FF goodness, activation norm, etc.). (JSON-serialized)

field.name: cross_domain
field.description: Cross-domain transfer: WikiText-trained probe on WikiText test, C4 test, C4 within (C4-trained on C4-test). (JSON-serialized)

field.name: control_sensitivity
field.description: Partial Spearman under different covariate sets. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: flagging_6a
field.description: Selective-prediction flagging summary at peak layer. (JSON-serialized)

recordSet.name: mechanistic-results-records
recordSet.description: Output of scripts/mechanistic_llama.py and scripts/mechanistic_mistral.py. Mean-ablation interventions and composition tracing at the observability peak layer.

field.name: model
field.description: Hugging Face model identifier (org/name).

field.name: label
field.description: Short human-readable model label.

field.name: n_layers
field.description: Transformer depth (number of decoder blocks).

field.name: hidden_dim
field.description: Hidden dimension (model width).

field.name: n_params_b
field.description: Parameter count in billions.

field.name: peak_layer
field.description: Observability peak layer used for the ablation interventions.

field.name: n_eval
field.description: Number of evaluation positions.

field.name: ablation_results
field.description: Per-component mean-ablation deltas. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: composition_results
field.description: Composition tracing across layer ranges. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: top_attn_layers
field.description: Layer indices of the largest attention-component contributors to the residual signal. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: top_attn_depth_range
field.description: Depth-fraction range of the top attention contributors, formatted as 'low-high' (e.g. '0.00-0.54').

field.name: wikitext_flagging
field.description: Selective-prediction flagging summary on the WikiText eval pool. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: c4_flagging
field.description: Selective-prediction flagging summary on the C4 eval pool. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: temperature_scaling
field.description: Temperature-scaling sensitivity of the ablation deltas. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: provenance
field.description: Run-level reproducibility metadata: model SHA, generating script, timestamp, device.

recordSet.name: medqa-results-records
recordSet.description: Output of scripts/rag_hallucination.py, scripts/medqa_selective.py, and scripts/truthfulqa_hallucination.py. Per-task selective-prediction and hallucination-detection summaries.

field.name: model
field.description: Hugging Face model identifier (org/name).

field.name: task
field.description: Downstream task family: SQuAD-style RAG QA, MedQA selective prediction, or TruthfulQA hallucination.

field.name: dataset
field.description: Hugging Face dataset identifier evaluated on this task.

field.name: peak_layer
field.description: Probe layer index sourced from the WikiText-trained main run.

field.name: n_questions
field.description: Number of evaluation items scored on this task.

field.name: n_errors
field.description: Number of evaluation items the model got wrong (denominator for exclusive-catch metrics).

field.name: accuracy
field.description: Fraction of evaluation items the model got correct.

field.name: probe_seeds
field.description: Probe-training seeds used for cross-seed averaging on the downstream cell. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: protocol
field.description: Per-task protocol parameters (prompt format, grading rules, target counts). (JSON-serialized)

field.name: per_question
field.description: Per-question evaluation records. Length and field set vary by task; not all runs persist all questions. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: flag_rates
field.description: Heterogeneous map: rate-keyed buckets (e.g. '0.05', '0.1') hold object summaries; scalar metric keys (e.g. 'observer_auacc', 'confidence_auacc') hold numbers. RAG and MedQA only. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: summary
field.description: Top-line metrics: AUC of accuracy-on-coverage curves, exclusive-catch counts, observer-vs-confidence comparison. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: quadrant
field.description: TruthfulQA confident-correct/wrong/abstain quadrant counts. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: standard_catches
field.description: Confidence-based baseline catch counts at fixed flag rates (TruthfulQA). (JSON-serialized)

field.name: confident_hallucination_catches
field.description: Observer-based catch counts on items the model answered confidently and incorrectly (TruthfulQA). (JSON-serialized)

field.name: confidence_threshold
field.description: Softmax threshold above which an answer is considered confident (TruthfulQA grading).

field.name: grading
field.description: Grading protocol descriptor (e.g., MC1 single-correct format with normalized substring match).

field.name: provenance
field.description: Run-level reproducibility metadata: model SHA, generating script, timestamp, device.

recordSet.name: nonlinear-probe-multilayer-results-records
recordSet.description: Output of scripts/nonlinear_probe.py (and the multilayer variant). One JSON per model. Compares 2-layer MLP probe to a linear head at the peak layer.

field.name: model
field.description: Hugging Face model identifier (org/name).

field.name: hidden_dim
field.description: Hidden dimension (model width).

field.name: peak_layer
field.description: Probe layer index sourced from the model's main run.

field.name: ex_dim
field.description: Tokens-per-feature-dim ratio for the probe fit.

field.name: seeds
field.description: Probe-training seeds used in the comparison. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: fixed_hp
field.description: Fixed-hyperparameter probe results. per_seed is an array of per-seed records; the exact field set inside each record varies by run (linear, mlp_64, mlp_128, delta_64, ...). (JSON-serialized)

field.name: swept_hp
field.description: Hyperparameter-swept probe results. per_seed is an array of per-seed records (linear, best_mlp, best_config, delta, ...). (JSON-serialized)

field.name: swept_hp_holdout
field.description: Held-out MLP-probe partial Spearman; appears in newer runs only. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: protocol
field.description: Probe protocol parameters (architecture variants, training schedule, hyperparameter sweep grid). (JSON-serialized)

field.name: conclusion
field.description: Free-form summary of the linear-vs-nonlinear comparison.

field.name: provenance
field.description: Run-level reproducibility metadata: model SHA, generating script, timestamp, device.

recordSet.name: residualizer-split-results-records
recordSet.description: Output of scripts/run_residualizer_split.py. Tests whether the OLS residualizer overfits to the probe-training pool by fitting it on a disjoint document pool R and applying without refit to the probe-training pool T. One JSON per model.

field.name: model
field.description: Hugging Face model identifier (org/name).

field.name: n_layers
field.description: Transformer depth (number of decoder blocks).

field.name: hidden_dim
field.description: Hidden dimension (model width).

field.name: layer
field.description: Layer index of the residualizer-split test (typically the model's main-run peak layer).

field.name: provenance
field.description: Run-level reproducibility metadata: model SHA, generating script, timestamp, device. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: protocol
field.description: Three-pool protocol parameters: tokens-per-dim ratio, seeds, and per-pool token and document budgets for T (probe-train), R (residualizer-fit), and V (held-out eval). (JSON-serialized)

field.name: residualizer_beta_main
field.description: OLS coefficients fit on T: [softmax_coef, norm_coef, intercept]. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: residualizer_beta_split
field.description: OLS coefficients fit on R: [softmax_coef, norm_coef, intercept]. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: main
field.description: Probe trained on T using residualizer fit on T (in-sample residualizer).

field.name: split_fit
field.description: Probe trained on T using residualizer fit on R (held-out residualizer).

field.name: delta_rho
field.description: split_fit.mean - main.mean

recordSet.name: shuffle-control-results-records
recordSet.description: Output of scripts/gpt2_shuffle_test.py and scripts/pythia_1.4b_shuffle.py. Two distinct historical shapes are accepted via oneOf; floor is model + provenance.

field.name: model
field.description: Hugging Face model identifier (org/name).

field.name: provenance
field.description: Run-level reproducibility metadata: model SHA, generating script, timestamp, device.

recordSet.description: Output of scripts/roc_width_sweep.py. Sweeps output-layer predictor widths to test whether mid-layer signal is absorbed by the output predictor.

field.description: Hugging Face model identifier (org/name).

field.name: n_params_b
field.description: Parameter count in billions.

field.name: hidden_dim
field.description: Hidden dimension (model width).

field.name: peak_layer
field.description: Mid-layer probe site under test.

field.name: output_layer
field.description: Output-side layer used for the controlled MLP predictor.

field.name: widths
field.description: Sweep grid of output-side MLP hidden widths (e.g. 64, 128, 256, 512). (JSON-serialized)

field.name: eval_seeds
field.description: Probe-training seeds used for cross-seed averaging. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: target_ex_per_dim
field.description: Tokens-per-feature-dim ratio for the probe fit.

field.name: results
field.description: Per-width residual partial correlation summary. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: provenance
field.description: Run-level reproducibility metadata: model SHA, generating script, timestamp, device.
